claims.summary: Any damping response must remain bounded and observable rather than becoming an unconstrained pressure correction.
claims.disposition: verify existing damping bounds, clamps, and exact regression fixtures

claims.summary: Pressure branches should distinguish current state and rescue context without silently changing the PI contract.
claims.disposition: verify pressure and rescue branches against unchanged regulator calculations

claims.summary: Regulator acceptance needs inhabitability evidence, not only arithmetic unit tests.
claims.disposition: verify bounded trajectory and parity fixtures already covering stable-core behavior

claims.summary: Changing thresholds, PI coefficients, damping, fill target, or rescue behavior alters live regulation.
